name: Focus Cards
summary: An interactive card grid where hovering over any card brings it into sharp focus while subtly blurring and dimming surrounding cards, creating a spotlight effect that guides user attention.
detailedDescription: The Focus Cards component creates an elegant, interactive card grid experience where user hover triggers a sophisticated focus effect. When users hover over any card in the grid, that card scales up slightly, increases in brightness and sharpness, while all surrounding cards subtly blur and dim. This creates a natural spotlight effect that immediately draws attention to the hovered content while de-emphasizing everything else. The effect uses CSS filters (blur, brightness) combined with transform scales to achieve the focus state. Transitions are smooth and choreographed, with the focus card animating in while others animate out simultaneously. The blur intensity, dim amount, and scale factors are all configurable to achieve anything from subtle enhancement to dramatic focus. Perfect for portfolio grids, product showcases, feature comparisons, or any card-based layout where guiding user attention to individual items enhances the browsing experience. The effect creates a premium, polished feel that makes interfaces more engaging and intuitive to explore.
purpose: Create spotlight focus effect highlighting hovered cards
Guide user attention through visual hierarchy manipulation
Enhance card grid exploration with interactive feedback
Add premium, polished feel to card-based interfaces
Support intuitive content browsing through visual cues
behavior: Detects hover on any card in the grid
Scales up and brightens hovered card for emphasis
Applies blur and dim filters to surrounding cards
Animates focus transitions smoothly and simultaneously
Configurable blur intensity, dim amount, and scale factors
Returns all cards to neutral state when hover ends
Maintains performance with efficient CSS filter usage
visualCharacteristics: Spotlight effect creating clear focus on hovered card
Surrounding cards blur and dim for contrast
Configurable from subtle to dramatic focus intensity
recommendations: Pairs well with testimonials, feature grids, and product highlight sections.
